criteria.name: Probabilistic Method
criteria.evidence: uncertainty.py::_distribution_samples uses scipy.stats.gaussian_kde on finite observation arrays, produces 256-sample distribution via kde.resample(). Handles edge cases (empty, single-value, constant arrays) with documented fallbacks. No heuristic scoring present. Unchanged since last review.

criteria.name: Station-Removal Risk
criteria.evidence: quantify_station_removal_risk iterates benchmark rows, produces per-station risk_probability (mean of KDE samples), ci_lower, ci_upper, risk_band. Probability is clipped to [0,1]. Tied to station divergence evidence via benchmark mean_abs_diff and correlation. Unchanged since last review.

criteria.name: Confidence Intervals
criteria.evidence: CI computed as np.quantile(samples, [0.1, 0.9]). test_quantify_station_removal_risk_intervals_widen_with_less_overlap verifies alpha(120 overlap) < beta(72) < gamma(12) interval width ordering. KDE bandwidth naturally widens with fewer/less-structured data points. Unchanged since last review.

criteria.name: Assumptions and Limitations
criteria.evidence: assumptions column documents KDE method and synthetic fallback. _limitations() flags stations with overlap_count < 24 as 'Insufficient overlap for reliable uncertainty estimation'. No false precision claimed. Unchanged since last review.

criteria.name: Integration with Recommendations
criteria.evidence: redundancy.py::build_station_recommendations calls quantify_station_removal_risk(benchmark) and merges via inner join on [station, reference_station]. _recommendation_from_row uses risk_band and ci_upper. _build_evidence_string includes uncertainty band and CI range. Unchanged since last review.

criteria.name: Test Quality
criteria.evidence: 8 tests pass. Tests verify distributional behavior: interval widening (test 2), Q90 tracking against empirical quantiles (test 7), KDE sample shape and bounds (test 8). Real data used in tests 6-8 (reads actual PEINP CSVs). Synthetic fixture in tests 1-5 has documented docstring with justification. No type-only or existence-only checks. Unchanged since last review.

summary: PASS. No source code or test changes since last review. The only commit (31f8c21) was the previous UnRalph verdict update. All 6 phase-6 acceptance criteria remain satisfied. All 8 uncertainty tests pass. last_reviewed_commit updated to current HEAD to prevent re-review loop.
